title: Bio-Regeneration doubles hit roll results

card.rawText: Can only be equipped to a creature with 9 or less remaining HP. Heal 30 HP. 2x Hit Roll results for this creature. 2x Atk Damage for this creature.

plan.title: Bio-Regeneration doubles hit roll results
plan.summary: Equip Bio-Regeneration to a modifier-zero creature and verify the hit roll total is doubled.

notes: Set player_1 primary current hp to 5 so Bio-Regeneration can be equipped.
Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the hit roll has no flat modifier.

steps: Equip Bio-Regeneration to player_1 primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.
Inspect the resolved hit roll total.

expectedAssertions.label: Hit roll result is doubled from 11 to 22

manualVerification: Confirm the multiplier applies to the final Hit Roll result after dice and modifiers.
riskNotes: Expected total assumes the deterministic success route rolls 6 and 5 with zero modifier, then applies the 2x hit result multiplier.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Bio-Regeneration hit roll result multiplier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
